title: Kadhalikkum Pennin Kaigal Lyrics Kadhalan
stanzas:
Kadhalikkum pennin
thottu neettinaal
chinna thagaram kooda
thangam thaane.

kadhalikkum pennin vanna
kannam rendile
minnum paruvam kooda
pavalam thaane.

kadhalikkum pen vadikkum
kai ezhuthile
kanda pizhaigal kooda
kavidhai aagume

gundu malli
rendu roobaai
un koondhal yeri
udhirum poo
kodi roobaai

panju mittaai
anju roobaai
nee paadhi thindru
thandhathaal
latcham roobaai

Kadhalikkum pennin kaigal
thottu neettinaal
chinna thagaram kooda
thangam thaane.

kadhalikkum pennin vanna
kannam rendile
minnum paruvam kooda
pavalam thaane.

kadhal ondrum
nalla neram
paarpadhillaye
raavu kaalam kooda
raasi aagumey

kadhal ketta
vaarthaiyaa enna
yaarum sollalaam
nee solla vendum
endru -

kadhal mullin
veliyaa enna
yaarum sellalaam
nee sella vendum
endru..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhalikkum Pennin Kaigal?

The song celebrates the beauty and allure of a woman in love, capturing the essence of romance and admiration.

Who are the singers of this song?

SPB and Udit Narayan lend their voices to this energetic and romantic track.

What role does this song play in the movie Kadhalan?

The song is a vibrant expression of love and attraction, highlighting the chemistry between the lead characters.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music was composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

When was the movie Kadhalan released?

The movie was released in 1994.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Kadhalan, Kadhalikkum Pennin Kaigal is a lively and romantic song that showcases the playful and passionate side of love. The song features the lead characters expressing their admiration and affection, set against a backdrop of vibrant music and dance. With its catchy tune and heartfelt lyrics by Vairamuthu, it captures the joy and excitement of young love. The combination of SPB and Udit Narayan's vocals with AR Rahman's composition makes it a memorable and timeless piece.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kadhalikkum Pennin Kaigal from the movie Kadhalan is a vibrant and romantic track that captures the essence of youthful love. With the magical voices of SPB and Udit Narayan, combined with AR Rahman's energetic composition, this song is a timeless classic. Dive into the enchanting world of romance and dance with this unforgettable number.
stanzaMeanings: When the loving girl's hands touch, even a small piece of metal becomes gold.
The colorful cheeks of the loving girl shine, even the season becomes like a gem.
Flowing sweat becomes sweet, a small glance becomes bliss.
The music of love, mm mm, is like the flowers of the earth.
The mistakes seen in the handwriting of a loving girl become poetry.
Love is not always pure, even flaws become sacred.
Two rupees for jasmine flowers, your hair makes them fall, costing ten rupees.
Five rupees for cotton candy, you ate half, making it worth a lakh.
When the loving girl's hands touch, even a small piece of metal becomes gold.
The colorful cheeks of the loving girl shine, even the season becomes like a gem.
Flowing sweat becomes sweet, a small glance becomes bliss.
The music of love, mm mm, is like the flowers of the earth.
Love doesn't always see good times, even night becomes lucky.
Love doesn't need a special messenger, even a crow can deliver the message.
Love doesn't smoke, love is never seen as a crime.
There is nothing shameful in this, the pain is not understood by the town.
The sky changes color, but love always remains.
The song sung by the bird will always be heard in the wind.
No one says love is a bad word, you must say it.
No one says love is a thorny fence, you must go through it.
